column1: C[oichi: hey, i noticed last night that this game is listed as a tournament game?

oichi: well, playing o17 instead of o16 lets W off easy in top right

prozz: with such comments if u like
C[oichi: the loose pincer is usually not good, but in this game it causes W problems
oichi: W would prefer to double approach or play 3-3,
oichi: but B has both side points, so W jumps out
oichi: and the loose pincer means W doesn't have j4 press on the bottom stone
oichi: so W plays joseki and cultivates patience :)
C[oichi: W had a bit of a misread at g17, good play by B :)
C[oichi: capturing s16 was good enough :)
oichi: you played well with the handicap stones, got in trouble in the center where you didn't have one
oichi: k14 and l12 were not so good, usually you play straight jumps to attack
oichi: and diagonal moves to run, because diagonal moves are better for eye shape
oichi: in this game, you left 3 cuts for W to play against
oichi: so W was able to even the score with the center capture
oichi: but taking s16 was very good, and good timing  :)
oichi: there is nothing left, thanks for the game
C[direwolf: good luck.. free untimed game :)
